gist.headline: Pruning the garden
gist.blurb: Our automated bot did a little spring cleaning, removing a broken link from the community app showcase to keep the garden tidy.
gist.summary: Automated removal of an inactive community app link from the showcase directory.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app showcase only features active, working projects.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and the Nomnom creature cleaning up the digital garden. Nomnom eating a dead leaf or a broken link (404 paper) to represent removing dead apps.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating a crumpled paper with '404' written on it, while the bee mascot sweeps up nearby with a tiny broom. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
